Video.summary: Join Sabrina for a masterclass in stress-free hosting, ambiance, and the very best cosmic vibes.
Video.title: Stars & Celebrations

Video.summary: Leah heads to comedian George Wallace's hotel-chic penthouse and Superbowl MVP Hines Ward's contemporary crib.
Video.title: George Wallace & Hines Ward

Video.summary: Armed with fresh ideas, Charli and Kylie turn a forgotten attic into a welcoming flex room.
Video.title: Erin + Jesse: An Attic Transformed

Video.summary: Class is officially in session as Brad and Jennifer head to three different sites to meet their student flippers.

Video.title: Demo and Drywall

Video.title: Doughnuts and Decisions
